# Project Owner Intake

Use this template when the project starts from a goal, business need, or user
problem rather than an existing engineering plan.

This file is an intake artifact. It does not authorize implementation.

## Five Questions

1. What do you want to build or change?
2. Who will use it?
3. What problem does it solve right now?
4. What can a user do when it succeeds?
5. What are you most worried about?

## Clarified Inputs

| Topic | Answer |
|---|---|
| Product idea | `<one sentence>` |
| Target users | `<users>` |
| Current problem | `<problem>` |
| Desired user outcome | `<observable outcome>` |
| Biggest risks | `<risks>` |
| Non-goals | `<excluded scope>` |
| Existing assets | `<docs, code, design, data, or none>` |
| Constraints | `<timeline, budget, platform, compliance, ops, support>` |

## Project Owner Acceptance Signals

List evidence the project owner can understand without reading code.

| Signal | Evidence |
|---|---|
| `<signal>` | `<browser/API/report/demo/runtime evidence>` |

## Draft Outputs

These are planning outputs, not executable authorization.

| Output | Path | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Simplified project profile draft | `docs/PROJECT_PROFILE.md` | `<draft/ready>` |
| Capability map | `docs/CAPABILITY_MAP.md` | `<draft/ready>` |
| Draft milestone candidates | `docs/CAPABILITY_MAP.md` | `<draft/ready>` |
| Granularity audit | `docs/CAPABILITY_MAP.md` | `<pending/pass/fail>` |
| Executable milestone roadmap | `docs/MILESTONE_ROADMAP.md` | `<not_started/promoted>` |

## Gate Before Implementation

Implementation may start only after:

- a capability map exists;
- draft milestones pass Milestone Granularity Gate;
- the first milestone has an accepted entry gate;
- phase docs name allowed files, verification, runtime smoke, non-goals, and
  stop conditions.
